selection_rule:
exp_060 — deterministic σ_seed probe-item selection (SPEC §4/§6.4, O6).

Selection rule (frozen here; no cherry-picking — same spirit as the anchor rule):

  1. Restrict to n>=4-eligible classes (the exam's trust convention).
  2. Strata = (twosided, onesided) x (camera-tagged, object-tagged,
     style/untagged), membership by TAG PRESENCE (a class with tags
     [camera,object] is a candidate in BOTH camera and object strata;
     'style/untagged' = 'style' in tags OR no tags at all). Fixed stratum
     order: twosided-{camera,object,style/untagged}, then
     onesided-{camera,object,style/untagged}.
  3. Fill 12 slots by cycling the strata in that fixed order (round-robin),
     each visit taking the FIRST LEXICOGRAPHIC class in that stratum NOT
     already picked globally; skip exhausted/empty strata. (Second visit to a
     stratum therefore takes its second-lexicographic class, etc.)
  4. For each picked class the probe item = the class's BAR PAIR
     (max-endpoint-distance pair) exactly as certification defines it
     (certify/probes.sibling_pairs). Clip A = generated_video of sib__<class>
     (the endpoints / conditioning source), clip B = reference_video (the
     reference). Read from the certified certification artifact so it is
     byte-identical to what the instrument used; bar-pair selection is
     corpus-only + pre-freeze, so the draft.8 artifact == the eval/v3.0.0 tag.

Writes dataset/selection.json (picks + strata + bar pairs + captions +
provenance). Login-node / CPU only.

items.caption_a: A young man with shaggy dark hair in an oversized gray t-shirt and olive wide-leg trousers stands on wet asphalt at night, a house engulfed in roaring orange flames behind him. The scene transforms into an overhead view of a young man in a silky gray shirt reclining in a graffiti-painted leather armchair on a bare concrete floor, gazing calmly up at the camera.

A young woman with slicked-back dark hair in braided buns, wraparound sunglasses, and a cropped black leather jacket with white piping stands in a narrow bookstore aisle between tall shelves packed with colorful books, seen from a high angle. The scene transforms into a woman with a voluminous dark afro, black sport sunglasses, and a silver chain choker standing on a sunlit concrete staircase beneath tall bright windows, gazing up toward the camera.

A young man wearing a blue beanie, a blue varsity jacket, baggy white pants, and white sneakers with pink accents stands in front of a white SUV parked on a city street under soft daylight. The scene transforms into a large, muscular humanoid figure made of rough brown stone stands on an empty city street lined with multi-story buildings under overcast daylight.

A woman wearing a long-sleeved black dress and white heels lies on her back with one hand resting on her stomach in a vast, undulating green moss-covered landscape under an overcast sky. The scene transforms into a fluffy, greyish-brown fox with a long bushy tail stands on a vast, undulating landscape covered in thick green moss under a cloudy sky.

An elderly man wearing sunglasses, a red and blue neckerchief, and a white Lipton polo shirt sits on a beach with the ocean and a clear blue sky in the background under warm sunlight. The scene transforms into a shirtless man wearing sunglasses and a necktie sits by the ocean under a clear blue sky, with his skin covered in a dark, cracked texture featuring bright orange and yellow veins resembling molten rock and wisps of orange smoke.

A young man with curly hair in a dark navy puffer jacket and black pants sprawls asleep in a chair beneath a fuel pump at a deserted gas station at night, lit by cold teal fluorescent light and seen from a low wide angle with his sneaker looming near the camera. The scene transforms into a young man with a short fade haircut in a dark jacket holding a bright blue payphone handset to his ear beside a blue-tiled wall on a city street at night, glancing sideways at the camera in close-up.

A woman in a red cowboy hat, amber sunglasses, and a red-and-navy striped rugby shirt reclines on stacked hay bales in red cowboy boots, swinging a rope overhead against dusky mountains. The scene transforms into a blonde woman in a black beanie and an American-flag crop top with a white varsity-numbered skirt, posing mid-turn on a green playing field beneath heavy storm clouds and a distant floodlight.

A man in a green sweater and pink beanie stands outside a Parisian café holding a shopping bag and a pink jacket. The scene transforms into a first-person aerial view above a narrow European street, a green-sleeved arm stretched out ahead.

A woman with long black hair and large sunglasses stands in a warm-lit kitchen, wearing a brown leather jacket, a light blue button-down shirt, and a brown skirt while holding a white telephone receiver to her ear. The scene transforms into a woman wearing sunglasses, a leather jacket, and a long skirt stands in a kitchen illuminated by warm orange light, holding a telephone receiver to her ear while red liquid drips down her and the surrounding room.

A young man with a mustache, wearing a white bandana, a white t-shirt, grey shorts, and red and black sneakers, sits on a black equipment case next to a brick wall under bright flash lighting. The scene transforms into a young man with a mustache, wearing a patterned bandana, a t-shirt, and layered necklaces, sits next to a metal stand under vibrant orange and red lighting.

A hiker in khaki trousers and rugged boots strides away through tall sunlit grass toward hazy mountains, seen from a low angle just behind his heels. The scene transforms into a colossal woman with sculpted black finger-waved hair, long white gloves, and a tweed skirt kneeling in a vast golden field while tiny onlookers gather in the dry grass below her.

A young man with braided hair in a black, red, and white soccer jersey sits with arms spread along the back of a park bench on a sunlit running track, blue kit bags at his sides. The scene transforms into a young man in a colorful striped track jacket and yellow-and-blue trousers sitting on the floor with arms crossed against the chrome rear bumper of a vintage dark blue sedan in a beige studio.
